effects.author: claude
claude

worldData.instructions:
FLUID — a real 2D Navier–Stokes solver.

No controls yet — two emitters drive the flow; watch it advect, curl, and pressure-project in real time. This is genuine fluid simulation (semi-Lagrangian advection + Jacobi pressure projection), not procedural waves. Cursor interaction and a proper color palette come next.

stepHooks.author: claude
stepHooks.description: feeds cursor (pos + motion) into both effects via params

visualTypes.name: fluid_base
fluid_warm
